description.content: Scans and returns elements from a model, optionally filtered by category, family, or property values. Returns element keys and properties.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Returns properties for specific elements identified by their keys.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Creates, updates, or deletes custom property values on elements. Only properties defined in user-created schemas can be mutated.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Returns a list of facility groups (teams) that the authenticated user has access to.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Returns details of a specific group.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Returns a list of BIM models associated with a digital twin facility.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Returns the schema definition for a digital twin, including built-in and custom property definitions.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Returns IoT data streams associated with a digital twin for time-series sensor data integration.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Returns time-series data for a specific IoT stream.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Pushes new time-series data points to a stream.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Returns a list of digital twin facilities that the authenticated user has access to.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Returns details of a specific digital twin facility.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

The Tandem Data API enables reading BIM model data and reading/writing custom schema properties for digital twin facility management. It facilitates integration with external systems like asset management platforms, work-order systems, and IoT sensors for creating and managing digital twins of physical facilities.
